name: AcouSort AB (publ)
summary: AcouSort AB (publ), a technology company, develops products and solutions for automated preparation of biological samples based on acoustofluidics technology for researchers and life science companies. It offers AcouTrap, a benchtop research instrument for sample preparation of cells, extracellular vesicles, bacteria, and viruses from various media; AcouPlasma, an integrated blood plasma separation module that enables in-line analysis of blood plasma from whole blood samples; and AcouWash, a benchtop research instrument for label-free separation of target cells from various samples. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Lund, Sweden.
